tasks.subject: Task 0: Pure red-carpet.js seam + unit suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New pure zero-import `public/js/ui/red-carpet.js` exporting `diffArrivals`, `playerCardModel`, `rollCameraLabel`, `marqueeSegments`, `ACCENT_EMOJI`, fully unit-pinned (deterministic, defensive, the stableId security sentinel, the byte-identical Roll-Camera truth-table). No barrel, no glue yet.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/ui/red-carpet.js
- Create: client-tests/red-carpet.test.js

**Verify:** `cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js` green; then full `cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest` green (additive over 52/395, zero pre-existing regression).

**Steps:** TDD — write red-carpet.test.js (diffArrivals: empty/idempotent/new-only/pruned/leave-rejoin/defensive/purity; playerCardModel: determinism/hue-range/emoji-frozen-12/label-matrix/derivation/**stableId-sentinel**/defensive; rollCameraLabel: full gating truth-table; marqueeSegments) → verify FAIL (no module) → create red-carpet.js (exported frozen ACCENT_EMOJI 12 single-scalar; pinned djb2 `h=((h<<5)+h+c)|0` then `>>>0`; accentHue=hash%360; accentEmoji=ACCENT_EMOJI[hash%12]; accent key `name+':'+id` ONLY, never stableId; label mirrors exact (You)/👑/• N 🏆; rollCameraLabel canStart=solo?>=1:>=2, enabled iff canStart&&amIHost, copy re-voiced only; diffArrivals seen=current roster, never mutates inputs) → verify PASS → full suite → branch-verify (`git -C C:/mm-phase7-5 branch --show-current`==phase7-5-red-carpet-lobby) → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/red-carpet.js", "client-tests/red-carpet.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["red-carpet.js zero imports; all functions pure (no DOM/socket/window/localStorage); WHY comments", "diffArrivals(seenIds,players)->{entering,seen}: seen=current roster, never mutates inputs, tolerates Set/array/null + missing-id", "playerCardModel deterministic; accentHue int 0-359 via pinned djb2; accentEmoji in exported frozen 12-set; label mirrors exact (You)/crown/wins; identical output WITH vs WITHOUT a stableId key (security sentinel)", "rollCameraLabel disabled/variant truth-table byte-identical to pre-7.5 start gating; only text re-voiced", "marqueeSegments: per-char array; ''/non-string -> []", "client-tests/red-carpet.test.js green; full npx jest green, additive over 52/395, zero pre-existing regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Barrel export + renderLobby glue + index.html wrappers + jsdom render test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the pure seam: barrel-export red-carpet.js; rewrite the renderLobby player-row build into Red Carpet entrance cards (animation only on diffed arrivals via a page-session module Set); Roll-Camera the Start button; group host controls into a presentational Director panel; add marquee + premiere copy in index.html (ALL existing ids preserved); migrate the bounded #waiting-room inline styles; pin with a new jsdom render test; keep render-lobby.test.js + every pre-existing suite byte-identically green. **Files:** - Modify: public/js/ui.js (barrel +1 line after the Phase-7.4 daily-ritual line) - Modify: public/js/ui/ui-render.js (direct sibling import; module-scoped _seenPlayerIds; the renderLobby player-row + settings-display + start-gating blocks) - Modify: public/index.html (#waiting-room ~242-300: marquee wrapper, premiere copy, Director-panel wrapper, bounded inline-style removal — ids preserved; #team-screen untouched) - Create: client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js **Verify:** `cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/render-lobby.test.js` green; then full `cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest` green (additive, zero pre-existing regression). **Steps:** TDD — write red-carpet-render.test.js (first render all .is-entering + accent + emoji; re-render same roster → 0 .is-entering; only newcomer animates; host crown + .btn-kick byte-identical + emit; .director-panel present + Roll-Camera gating; NO stableId in #waiting-room; team mode → 0 entrance cards + team lists populated) → verify FAIL → barrel +1 line; ui-render.js direct `import {diffArrivals,playerCardModel,rollCameraLabel} from './red-carpet.js'` + module `let _seenPlayerIds=new Set()`; rewrite player-row (lines 55-101) into entrance-card (li + #lobby-players + label + .bot-badge + .btn-kick byte-identical; remove li.style.cssText; --card-accent inline data value; emoji+name spans; .is-entering iff entering.includes(p.id)); remove `lobbySettings.style.display='flex'` (grep-verify sole writer first) ; replace start-gating (138-152) with rollCameraLabel + .roll-camera variant classes (remove startBtn.style.display='block'); index.html marquee wrapper + premiere `

` + .waiting-public-toggle + .director-panel wrapper + .theme-select + remove style=display:none on #lobby-settings/#start-btn (all ids preserved, #team-screen untouched) → verify new test + render-lobby.test.js BOTH green → full suite → branch-verify → commit. ```json:metadata {"files": ["public/js/ui.js", "public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/index.html", "client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/render-lobby.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ui.js re-exports ./ui/red-carpet.js (+WHY); ui-render.js imports via direct sibling ./red-carpet.js (no barrel cycle — 7.3 DAG)", "renderLobby: page-session _seenPlayerIds; each row

  • in #lobby-players with --card-accent + emoji chip + exact label + .is-entering ONLY for diffed arrivals; .bot-badge + .btn-kick (condition + emit) byte-identical; inline li.style.cssText/lobbySettings.style.display/startBtn.style.display removed (bounded DS-01) + the now-dead lobbySettings ui-dom import dropped; team-mode early return untouched; WHY comments", "Start button via rollCameraLabel (.roll-camera + roll-camera--{variant}, text, disabled) — enable/disable byte-identical to pre-7.5", "index.html: .marquee/.marquee__title around room-code h2; premiere

    ; .director-panel + __header wrapping existing mode-selector+lobby-settings+start-btn; .theme-select + .waiting-public-toggle classes; style=display:none removed from #lobby-settings + #start-btn; EVERY existing id preserved; #team-screen untouched", "client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js green; render-lobby.test.js + all pre-existing suites BYTE-IDENTICAL and green; full npx jest green, additive, zero pre-existing regression"]} ```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Append-only Red Carpet CSS section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append the Red-Carpet styles to public/css/02-hero-lobby.css — marquee, entrance card + states + @keyframes cardEntrance (transform/opacity only), Director panel, the migrated .theme-select/.waiting-public-toggle, .roll-camera variants — append-only (no existing rule edited), token-driven, reduced-motion auto-covered by the existing global block.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (append a new section at EOF — current last content line 728 .bot-thinking)

**Verify:** `cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest` all green (additive over 52/395, zero regressions). `git diff public/css/02-hero-lobby.css | grep '^-' | grep -v '^---'` prints NOTHING (purely additive). Visual + reduced-motion eyeball is user-side (jsdom never lays out).

**Steps:** Append the Red Carpet section at EOF after the .bot-thinking rule (marquee/.marquee__title + #lobby-code-display; #lobby-players li.entrance-card flex/gap/border-left hsl(var(--card-accent)); .entrance-card__emoji/__name; .is-you; .is-entering animation:cardEntrance 0.34s both; @keyframes cardEntrance opacity+transform ONLY; .director-panel + __header + scoped .mode-selector divider reset; .theme-select reproduces removed inline verbatim w/ --radius-sm==6px; .waiting-public-toggle position:absolute top0 right0; .roll-camera display:block + --ready/--waiting-* box-shadow hooks) → verify append-only (git diff no deletions) → full suite green → branch-verify → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5 && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Section appended at EOF; NO existing rule edited/reordered/removed (git diff shows only additions after .bot-thinking)", "@keyframes cardEntrance animates ONLY opacity + transform (compositor-safe; no width/layout/colour)", ".theme-select reproduces the removed inline declarations; .waiting-public-toggle = position:absolute;top:0;right:0;; .roll-camera sets display:block (restores removed inline/JS display)", "Uses 01-base.css tokens where they apply; no per-rule prefers-reduced-motion (global 06-states-anim.css block auto-covers)", "full npx jest green, additive over 52/395, zero regressions; visual/reduced-motion eyeball flagged user-side"]}
```
